name: Pumpkin Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a measuring cup, lightly spoon flour and level off.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour and sugar. Using a pastry blender, cut in margarine until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
4. Stir in pecans.
5. Gradually stir in 1-1/4 cups of the crumb mixture, ginger, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, cloves, buttermilk, molasses, pumpkin, and egg; mix well.
6. Pour batter evenly into a greased pan.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Serve with ice cream and caramel sauce, garnishing with chopped pecans.
